infrastructure_issues.api_crash_loop: dev API crashed repeatedly during testing (502 Bad Gateway), brief recovery windows of 5-11s uptime
infrastructure_issues.rate_limit: auth/login rate limited at 10 req/15min, requiring browser session reuse
infrastructure_issues.owner_pro_role: owner-pro@doable.me is viewer in main workspace, owner only in QA Team Workspace

test_results.note: GET /workspaces/:wsId/connectors returns 200 with 4 connectors, correct fields
All 4 built-in MCP Apps present: Markdown, PDF, Presentation, Spreadsheet Builder
stdio transport not available for user-created connectors. Returns 403. May be by design.
HTTP connector (streamable_http) created successfully, HTTP 201
SSE connector (http_sse) created successfully, HTTP 201
http:// URL accepted for HTTP connector (HTTP 201). Should be rejected.
PATCH update connector returns 200 with updated name
DELETE user-created connector returns 200 {deleted:true}
Built-in Markdown Builder connector was deleted via DELETE (should be blocked)
PATCH {enabled:false} returns 200 but status stays active. enable/disable not implemented.
GET /connectors/:id/tools returns 200 with 2 tools for Markdown Builder
GET /connectors/:id/tools returns HTTP 500 for inactive HTTP connector
Cross-tenant connector access returns 403
Workspace connectors visible to viewer role members
capabilities_cache=null on new connector (not yet initialized)
Audit log: /connectors/audit treated as UUID param. No audit log endpoint found.
GET /connectors/:id/logs returns 404 - debug log endpoint not implemented
server_env_encrypted not returned in GET response
POST with bogus id returns 400 Invalid id: must be a UUID
GET with trailing slash bogus id returns 308 redirect (not 400)
PATCH with bogus id returns 400
DELETE with bogus id returns 400
GET /tools with bogus id returns 400
Bogus workspaceId returns 400 Invalid workspaceId: must be a UUID
discover literal segment not blocked by UUID guard
Valid UUID nonexistent connector returns 404 Connector not found
Chat invokes MCP tools (tool_call emitted) but mcp_ui_resource absent
mcp_ui_resource SSE event not emitted on dev. MCP Apps UI not functional.
No token/secret fields in GET connector response
POST /projects/:id/chat/mcp-call endpoint exists with correct schema
Invalid JWT signature returns 401
Expired JWT returns 401
GET /integrations returns 404. Correct route is /integrations/catalog
No pagination limit enforced - returns all 533 regardless of limit param
No cursor pagination in catalog response
Category filter works. Categories use underscores (crm_sales not crm)
authType filter not working - returns all 533 regardless
?q= search not working. Only ?search= works. Spec uses ?q=.
Categories array present in catalog response top level
GET /integrations/catalog/:slug returns 200 with integration detail
Integration detail missing connectUrl field
Only 533 integrations cataloged, expected 630+
No cache-control or ETag headers on catalog response
Gzip compression enabled
No XSS found in catalog descriptions
GET /integrations/connections?workspaceId= returns 200
Cross-tenant connections returns 403
Anon access to catalog returns 401
Catalog response time 849ms, exceeds 500ms SLA
Bad slug returns 404 Integration not found
/integrations/enhanced-auth/start 404. Legacy /oauth/:slug/authorize returns 200+JSON not 302
/__doable/connector-proxy returns 404. Not implemented on dev.
DELETE /integrations/connections/:id exists, returns 404 for nonexistent (correct)
Built-in connectors present and status=active
Markdown Builder create_markdown tool present
Built-in connectors deletable via DELETE
